glosses.ja: 彫る; ディスクに書き込む

sentences.target: Je grave ton prénom sur la bague.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ɡʁav tɔ̃ pʁenɔ̃ syʁ la baɡ/

translations.fr: Je grave ton prénom sur la bague.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ɡʁav tɔ̃ pʁenɔ̃ syʁ la baɡ/
translations.en: I'm engraving your first name on the ring.
translations.es: Estoy grabando tu nombre en el anillo.
translations.de: Ich graviere deinen Vornamen in den Ring.
translations.it: Sto incidendo il tuo nome sull'anello.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在戒指上刻你的名字。
translations.ru: Я гравирую твоё имя на кольце.
translations.pt: Estou gravando o seu nome no anel.
translations.he: אני חורט את השם שלך על הטבעת.
translations.vi: Tôi đang khắc tên của bạn lên chiếc nhẫn.
translations.nl: Ik graveer je voornaam in de ring.
translations.uk: Я гравірую твоє ім’я на кільці.
translations.hi: मैं अंगूठी पर तुम्हारा नाम उकेर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Χαράζω το όνομά σου στο δαχτυλίδι.
translations.nb: Jeg graverer fornavnet ditt i ringen.
translations.id: Aku sedang mengukir namamu di cincin.
translations.sv: Jag graverar ditt förnamn i ringen.
translations.da: Jeg graverer dit fornavn i ringen.
translations.ja: 指輪にあなたの名前を刻んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the subject of the finite verb 'grave'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking 'prénom' as direct object.
Second-person singular possessive determiner, masculine singular; agrees with 'prénom'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'grave'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement ('la bague').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'bague'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Vous pouvez graver ce trophée aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Vous pouvez graver ce trophée aujourd'hui.
translations.en: You can engrave this trophy today.
translations.de: Sie können diesen Pokal heute gravieren.
translations.ko: 오늘 이 트로피에 새길 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 您今天可以在这个奖杯上刻字。
translations.yue: 你今日可以喺呢個獎盃上刻字。
translations.ru: Вы можете нанести гравировку на этот кубок сегодня.
translations.pt: Você pode gravar este troféu hoje.
translations.he: אתה יכול לחרוט את הגביע הזה היום.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể khắc chiếc cúp này hôm nay.
translations.nl: U kunt deze trofee vandaag graveren.
translations.uk: Ви можете вигравіювати цей кубок сьогодні.
translations.hu: Ma be lehet gravírozni ezt a trófeát.
translations.hi: आप आज इस ट्रॉफी पर नक़्क़ाशी कर सकते हैं.
translations.el: Μπορείτε να χαράξετε αυτό το κύπελλο σήμερα.
translations.nb: Du kan gravere dette trofeet i dag.
translations.id: Anda bisa mengukir piala ini hari ini.
translations.sv: Du kan gravera den här pokalen i dag.
translations.da: Du kan gravere dette trofæ i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はこのトロフィーに刻印できます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person plural/formal singular; subject of 'pouvez'.
Finite modal verb in present indicative, 2nd person plural; takes infinitival complement 'graver'.
Infinitive verb; lexical complement of the modal 'pouvez'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'trophée'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'graver'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the event of 'graver'; orthographically includes an apostrophe but functions as a single token.

sentences.target: On grave la date sur le bois.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɡʁav la dat syʁ lə bwa/

translations.fr: On grave la date sur le bois.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɡʁav la dat syʁ lə bwa/
translations.en: We're engraving the date on the wood.
translations.es: Estamos grabando la fecha en la madera.
translations.de: Wir gravieren das Datum ins Holz.
translations.it: Stiamo incidendo la data sul legno.
translations.pt: Estamos gravando a data na madeira.
translations.he: אנחנו חורטים את התאריך על העץ.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang khắc ngày lên gỗ.
translations.nl: We graveren de datum in het hout.
translations.hi: हम लकड़ी पर तारीख उकेर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 木に日付を刻んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/indefinite subject pronoun; triggers 3rd person singular agreement on 'grave'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking 'la date' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'date'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'grave'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement ('le bois').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'bois'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Nous gravons un CD pour la fête.
sentences.reading: /nu ɡʁavɔ̃ œ̃ se de puʁ la fɛt/

translations.fr: Nous gravons un CD pour la fête.
translations.ipa: /nu ɡʁavɔ̃ œ̃ se de puʁ la fɛt/
translations.en: We're burning a CD for the party.
translations.es: Estamos grabando un CD para la fiesta.
translations.de: Wir brennen eine CD für die Party.
translations.it: Stiamo masterizzando un CD per la festa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在为聚会刻录一张光盘。
translations.yue: 我哋為個派對燒一隻碟。
translations.pt: Estamos gravando um CD para a festa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang ghi một đĩa CD cho bữa tiệc.
translations.nl: We branden een cd voor het feest.
translations.hi: हम पार्टी के लिए एक सीडी बर्न कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Γράφουμε ένα CD για το πάρτι.
translations.nb: Vi brenner en CD til festen.
translations.id: Kami sedang membakar CD untuk pesta.
translations.sv: Vi bränner en cd till festen.
translations.da: Vi brænder en cd til festen.
translations.ja: パーティー用にCDを焼いています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of 'gravons'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, selecting 'CD' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'CD'.
Common noun (abbreviation), masculine; direct object of 'gravons'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/benefactive complement ('la fête').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'fête'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.
